title: move prognostic edmf diffusion only longrun to gpu

body: There is some repetition between the quadrature and diagnostic edmf optiion. I could maybe try to combine them. Tho on the other hand dispatching is probably the more elegant way to go
title: Add cloud diagnostics for diagnostic edmf
